title: Claim-Bounded Diagnostics for SPARC Galaxy Rotation-Curve Residuals: Scale-Normalized Residual-Response Family Tests and Null-Control Audits
description: Claim-bounded repository package for a diagnostic audit of scale-normalized residual-response family tests in SPARC galaxy rotation-curve residuals. The package is a reduced diagnostic/reproducibility artifact and does not claim dark-matter exclusion, Lambda-CDM replacement, MOND/RAR falsification, a physical TVC mechanism, or a Hubble-tension solution. The Zenodo identifier generated for this record should be interpreted as a repository-archive DOI, not as a standalone peer-reviewed article DOI.
